# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) version 2.1.

## Summary

We want Signal to be a welcoming space for contributors from any background. That means being respectful in reviews, assuming good intent, and keeping discussion focused on the work. Personal attacks, harassment, and discriminatory language are not acceptable here.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness behavior that violates the Contributor Covenant, email `jaysahnan31@gmail.com`. Reports are kept confidential.

Maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing standards, and may remove, edit, or reject contributions and participation that don't align with this Code of Conduct.

## Full text

The full text of the Contributor Covenant v2.1, which governs this project, is available at:

https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/
